name: Mexican Chicken Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil the chicken until it is tender.
2. Remove the chicken and reserve the broth.
3. Remove the skin and bones from the chicken and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Grate the cheese and mix with the chopped tomatoes.
5. Combine the chicken, onions, cheese, garlic salt, chili powder, and tomatoes in a bowl.
6. Place the tortillas in boiling chicken broth until softened.
7. Line a large baking dish with softened tortillas.
8. Add the chicken mixture.
9. Pour the 2 cans of soup over the chicken.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes or until bubbly and hot.
